design_decisions: Removed test-only combined persistence mode and updated tests to construct service with separate settings_store and cache_path.
Refactored settingsMutationRuntime to unify the 5 settings mutators into a single generic mutateSetting function.

results: All tests pass. Ruff and Pytest gates green. Frontend vitest, tsc, and build checks green. Commits made cleanly per-unit.
